span.p:
review-required is NOT a Charter state.
It is a record-level interrupt (see Figure 5-1).
The Charter stays in fields-completed while
individual records interrupt.

svg.text: Figure 3-1 — Charter Lifecycle State Machine (faithful to substrate v5.1.0)
